title: 宝塚記念の後に・焦り禁物わかってらあ

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inari One wins the Takarazuka Kinen and is finally
seen by the audience as someone with equal
prowess to Oguri Cap.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she seems dissatisfied by her
performance today. Even after the race ends, she
remains stiff and uneasy.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We set autumn Tenno Sho as our next big goal.
It's almost certain that both Oguri Cap and Super
Creek will be racing in it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time to embark on our path with a fresh start,
so as a warm-up leading to the autumn Tenno
Sho, we also decide to take on the Mainichi
Okan.
